reasons: Lolita can reduce Beatrix's poke and burst value by blocking many ranged projectile patterns.
Her shield protection is especially useful during siege or objective fights where Beatrix wants free weapon pressure.

proof.summary: Beatrix wants ranged weapon pressure, while Lolita can deny many ranged or projectile attack patterns and protect her team.
worksBestWhen: Team plays behind Lolita during siege or objective fights.
failureCases: Beatrix attacks from a side angle.
Beatrix waits out the shield or changes angle.

reasons: Franco can punish Beatrix when she steps forward to aim or free-hit.
Hook and suppression remove Beatrix's ability to reposition or continue weapon pressure during the catch.

proof.summary: Beatrix wants controlled spacing and weapon uptime, while Franco can force a single-target catch with hook or suppression.
worksBestWhen: Franco hides vision and catches Beatrix after Tactical Reposition.
Team can burst Beatrix during suppression.
failureCases: Beatrix stays behind minions and frontline.
Franco suppresses a tank while Beatrix remains free.

reasons: Natalia pressures Beatrix before she can set up safe weapon spacing.
Backline assassination threat forces Beatrix to play closer to peel.

proof.summary: Beatrix wants safe ranged control, while Natalia can attack from concealment and punish isolated positioning.
failureCases: Beatrix stays grouped with tank or support.
Natalia cannot burst before help arrives.

reasons: Saber can punish Beatrix when she is isolated or after she uses repositioning.
His lock-burst profile is reliable against fragile marksmen if he reaches them.

proof.summary: Beatrix wants to choose weapon range, while Saber can force a lock-and-burst sequence before she can continue attacking.
worksBestWhen: Beatrix's defensive spell or support peel is unavailable.
failureCases: Saber dives through the enemy frontline.
Beatrix survives with defensive item or peel.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag Beatrix out of safe firing position.
This is useful when Beatrix is protected behind frontline but still reachable by Flicker or flank.

proof.summary: Beatrix wants uninterrupted ranged damage, while Kaja can force a single-target catch and remove her from safe spacing.
worksBestWhen: Kaja has flank or Flicker access.
Team bursts Beatrix immediately after pull.
failureCases: Beatrix's team counter-engages after the pull.
